items.title: Senegal approves tougher anti-gay law as rights groups raise concerns
items.dek: "Violence and fear" will spike and "equality and non-discrimination" will be trampled on, warn critics.
items.body: "Violence and fear" will spike and "equality and non-discrimination" will be trampled on, warn critics.

items.title: Death toll from Ethiopia floods and landslides rises to more than 60
items.dek: Forecasters say storms are becoming more intense in the region, partly due to global warming.
items.body: Forecasters say storms are becoming more intense in the region, partly due to global warming.

items.title: Hozier, Jessie Buckley and Bruce Springsteen record Shane MacGowan tribute album
items.dek: The album will also feature Primal Scream, David Gray, Jessie Buckley, Johnny Depp and Kate Moss.
